codeReview.summary: All 5 expected behaviors are properly implemented: (1) execute_task runs full Planner→Generator→Evaluator pipeline via ExecutionController; (2) PolicyEffect/PolicyDecision have 'Ask' variant; (3) FeatureLeadSpawner integrated with spawn_feature_lead() called; (4) value_scorer exported from lib.rs; (5) apply_decay stubbed with explanatory comment.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The transcript shows the worker started rust-analyzer MCP server in another process. While not required for this feature, the AGENTS.md mentions MCP integration. No issues with implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows workspace exploration with rust-analyzer

summary: Feature implementation is complete and correct. All 5 expected behaviors verified: PlannerAgent/EvaluatorAgent wired into execute_task pipeline (using MockLlm for MVP), 'Ask' variant added to PolicyEffect/PolicyDecision enums, FeatureLeadSpawner integrated with graceful degradation, value_scorer module exported with all types, apply_decay stubbed with documentation comment. Code compiles and tests pass.
